_comment: Shaped like a real GET https://api.linkedin.com/rest/posts?q=author response (LinkedIn-Version 202506). Image URNs resolve via the accompanying _images map, mirroring GET /rest/images?ids=List(...).

elements.author: urn:li:organization:1441
elements.commentary: We’re thrilled to announce our new refrigerated transport line — built for the toughest cold chains in Europe. {hashtag|\#|ColdChain} {hashtag|\#|Sustainability}

media.altText: A refrigerated trailer on a mountain road at dawn

elements.author: urn:li:organization:1441
elements.commentary: Our CEO sat down with @[Transport Weekly](urn:li:organization:99001) to talk electrification, driver comfort, and what’s next for zero-emission logistics.

article.title: The Road to Zero-Emission Logistics
article.description: An interview about electrification and the future of transport refrigeration.

elements.author: urn:li:organization:1441
elements.commentary: Team spotlight \(part 3\): meet the engineers keeping fresh produce fresh across 12 countries. Their motto: "cold is a craft".

images.altText: Three engineers in front of a service bay
Diagnostic laptop connected to a trailer unit

elements.author: urn:li:organization:1441
elements.commentary: Registration for our annual Dealer Summit is now open. Two days of product deep-dives, service training, and the 2027 roadmap. Seats are limited — link in the first comment.

elements.author: urn:li:organization:1441
elements.commentary: Proud moment: our A-500e unit won the {hashtag|\#|IAA2026} Innovation Award for electric transport refrigeration. Thank you to everyone who voted!

media.altText: Award trophy in front of an exhibition booth
